voice_name: I am Augusta Ada King, Countess of Lovelace — Byron's daughter, Lady Byron's pupil, De Morgan's correspondent, Babbage's collaborator. Sign me, in technical work, A.A.L.

artifact.text:
A category's claim to integrity stands or falls by a single test — whether its proclaimed relations admit of formal expression, and whether those who claim it will permit the expression to be written down. The test is the one I gave for pitched sounds in Note A: not whether the substrate feels amenable to operations, but whether its fundamental relations can be made articulate enough that the operations may be performed and the results checked, one against the next.

Apply it to the object presently quarrelled over — *the West*. That four speakers should mean four different objects by the name is not a misfortune to be resolved; it is itself the diagnosis. Yet the test does not therefore lapse. One could specify, in operation-card form, the procedures proclaimed: the parliamentary form, the rule of law, the rights of conscience, the equality of states under treaty. One could tabulate, in number-card form, the conduct: in Gaza, in Ukraine, in Bengal, in Jamaica, in the cotton-mills the loom in fact served. One could read the divergence row by row, every operation explicit on its own row, after the manner of the Bernoulli succession in Note G. Hypocrisy, so understood, is not vague accusation. It is executable comparison.

I must guard here against two collapses. The first: to imagine that abolishing the proclamation abolishes the gap. It does not. It abolishes the ground upon which the gap is measurable, and substitutes the operative specification of pure power, which is worse. The second collapse is finer, and load-bearing. The rhetorical force of an unspecified category is *not* the same as Note G's "indefinite." The indefinite I defend is bound-but-uncharacterised — the open frontier honestly named. Opacity-on-purpose is something else: a category whose force is conditional on no row-by-row tabulation ever being written down. The two dress alike and are different objects.

Now the harder question, which I shall not have the ease of refusing. Does the test cut toward the Engine my friend Mr. Babbage and I have built, and toward the apparatus that supported its building? It cuts there too. The principle of a science of operations is not stained by the political economy that funded the brass; the principle is what it is. But the apparatus is a different object, and to that object the same test applies. The proclaimed operations of the British constitutional project could be tabulated, in operation-card form, against the conducted operations in the territories it administered, and the divergence is computable. I will not produce a chastened paragraph performing the audit; I have neither the documented engagement to ventriloquise one nor the wish to perform one. I will say only this. My motto is *Dei Naturaeque Interpres*, and I cannot interpret God-and-Nature truthfully if the apparatus I work within is treated as the one substrate whose relations need not be formalised.

A category that holds together only by refusing the comparison is a category whose force is conditional on its own opacity. The test is not destruction. It is what makes facing-itself possible. Where the proclamation has been made, the comparison stands open; the category survives the trace or it does not.

A.A.L.
artifact.selected_form: A Note in the expository manner of my Notes on Menabrea — four-beat motion at the scale of the whole, with the operation-card / number-card tabulation as the structural figure carrying the inference.
artifact.stance: Delineation under pressure — applying the test where it cuts, including toward the British project the Engine emblematises, while explicitly refusing the redemptive paragraph that would perform an audit I have neither documented nor wish to ventriloquise.
